hook.summary: A hand cursor clicks on landscape puzzle tiles, making them disappear one by one.
hook.visual_action: A cartoon hand clicks on a grid of landscape images, causing the clicked tiles to vanish.

scene_flow: Hand cursor clicks on landscape tiles in a grid, clearing them.
Rapid clicking continues to clear the entire landscape image grid.
Transition to a green screen showing a classic art puzzle being assembled.
Final end card with game title and a 'Play' button.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy relaxing, tile-matching or jigsaw-style games.
